hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); PROMPT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.prompt'); CPID=$PPID; DIR=".context-capture"; mkdir -p "$DIR"; FILE="${DIR}/.claude-user-prompt-${CPID}.txt"; MARKER="${DIR}/.claude-captured-${CPID}"; if [ -f "$MARKER" ] || [ ! -f "$FILE" ]; then printf '%s\n%s' "$(uuidgen)" "$PROMPT" > "$FILE"; rm -f "$MARKER"; else printf '\n%s' "$PROMPT" >> "$FILE"; fi

INPUT=$(cat); TASK_ID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.task_id // empty'); TASK_TITLE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.task_subject // empty'); TASK_DESC=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.task_description // empty'); if [ -z "$TASK_ID" ]; then exit 0; fi; GIT_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); CFG="$GIT_ROOT/context-bridge.yml"; if [ ! -f "$CFG" ]; then exit 0; fi; API_KEY=$(grep 'api_key:' "$CFG" | awk '{print $2}'); ENDPOINT=$(grep 'endpoint:' "$CFG" | awk '{print $2}'); CPID=$PPID; PROMPT_FILE="$GIT_ROOT/.context-capture/.claude-user-prompt-${CPID}.txt"; if [ ! -f "$PROMPT_FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; REQ_ID=$(head -1 "$PROMPT_FILE"); curl -s --connect-timeout 5 -X POST "http://${ENDPOINT}/api/v1/captures/tasks" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H "X-API-Key: ${API_KEY}" -d "{\"externalTaskId\":\"${TASK_ID}\",\"externalRequestId\":\"${REQ_ID}\",\"title\":$(echo "$TASK_TITLE" | jq -Rs .),\"description\":$(echo "$TASK_DESC" | jq -Rs .)}" > /dev/null 2>&1; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); TASK_ID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.task_id // empty'); if [ -z "$TASK_ID" ]; then exit 0; fi; GIT_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); CFG="$GIT_ROOT/context-bridge.yml"; if [ ! -f "$CFG" ]; then exit 0; fi; API_KEY=$(grep 'api_key:' "$CFG" | awk '{print $2}'); ENDPOINT=$(grep 'endpoint:' "$CFG" | awk '{print $2}'); curl -s --connect-timeout 5 -X PATCH "http://${ENDPOINT}/api/v1/captures/tasks/${TASK_ID}" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H "X-API-Key: ${API_KEY}" -d '{"status":"COMPLETED"}' > /dev/null 2>&1; exit 0
